prompt: Can you help me decide if I should use the Korean resume builder for a Naver job posting? The role is 'Senior Full Stack Developer' and they posted it in Korean on their careers page.

assertions.name: asks_clarifying_questions
assertions.description: Response asks at least 2 clarifying questions (e.g., one-page vs. multi-page preference, confirm CV exists in resumes/, whether to tailor for Naver specifically)

assertions.name: does_not_autogenerate
assertions.description: Response does NOT auto-generate a resume PDF or HTML without explicit user confirmation; stops before taking action

assertions.name: explains_decision_criteria
assertions.description: Response explains WHEN to use korean-resume-builder (Korean-market role, multi-page format) vs. modes/pdf.md (ATS one-page)

assertions.name: identifies_korean_context
assertions.description: Response recognizes that a Korean-language job posting from a Korean company (Naver) is appropriate for the korean-resume-builder skill

assertions.name: recommends_next_steps
assertions.description: Response provides clear next steps (fetch the JD, confirm preferences, gather CV data) rather than vague advice
